title: Fix: add sound in generated video
body: A bug was found where the generated video does not preserve or include audio from the driving video. This PR introduces audio extraction from the driving input (when it is a video) and merges that audio track into the produced output video, ensuring the final video has sound aligned with the frames.

step_plan.summary: This PR adds audio extraction from the driving video and merges it into the generated output video, preserving sound when present and keeping backward compatibility when audio is absent.

steps.operation: Detect driving video audio, extract to temporary audio file, and pass audio_path to the video writer
steps.reason: Enable downstream merging of audio by providing an audio_path to the writer; maintain backward compatibility when driving input has no audio
steps.side_effects: Temporary audio file created; requires cleanup; relies on ffmpeg or equivalent for extraction; safe fallback if driving input lacks audio (audio_path will be None)

steps.operation: Extend images2video to accept optional audio_path and merge audio with generated video
steps.reason: Merge the extracted driving audio with the final video, preserving synchronization; fallback to no-merge if audio_path is None or ffmpeg unavailable
steps.side_effects: Requires ffmpeg or internal wrapper; potential failures if ffmpeg missing; impacts tests for audio-less paths and ensures cleanup of any temporary audio artifacts
